ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user for commenting */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the blog post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the blog post */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was published */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anonymous_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment made by an anonymous user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name or identifier used by the anonymous commenter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address provided by the anonymous commenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment related to the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., comment posted, comment edited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_activity_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., edited, deleted, flagged) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the moderation action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_moderation_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "moderator_name" TEXT /* Name of the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the moderator joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, trophy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rewards" (
  "user_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user reward redemption */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who redeemed the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward that was redeemed */,
  "redeem_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like on a comment */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the comment */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date when the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the author joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_ratings_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_tags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("id")
)
